name: HiBob
tagline: Modern HR platform for scaling companies
description: HiBob (Bob) is a modern HRIS designed for fast-growing mid-size companies. It handles core HR, performance management, compensation, and culture — with a consumer-grade UX that employees actually enjoy using.
use_cases: Your company is scaling from 50 to 500 employees and needs a proper HRIS that replaces spreadsheets without requiring enterprise-level budget
You want employees to actually engage with the HR platform — org charts, kudos, surveys, and announcements — not just use it for payslips
Your People team runs performance cycles and compensation reviews and needs both in the same system alongside core HR data
You're a global team with employees across multiple countries who need localised time-off policies and compliance without a separate tool
